title: OAuthFlow
content:
# OAuthFlow


## Methods


### __init__(base_url: str) -> Any


### start_browser_authentication(open_browser_window: bool) -> Dict

Start the OAuth authentication flow.


### authenticate_with_password(username: str, password: str, totp: Optional[str]) -> Dict

Authenticate using Resource Owner Password Credentials Grant.


### authenticate_with_client_credentials(client_id: str, client_secret: str) -> Dict

Authenticate using Client Credentials Grant.


### refresh_tokens(refresh_token: str) -> Dict

Refresh tokens using the refresh token.


### logout(refresh_token: str) -> None

Logout by clearing stored credentials.


### get_user_info(access_token: str) -> Dict

Get user information using an access token. This validates the token and returns user details if the token is valid.
